pages.text: $(bold)Pipe Cactus Seed$()$(br2)The organ-pipe cactus of rocky bajadas. Pressed from cactus + gravel.
pages.title: Pipe Cactus Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant on sand to raise the dynamic pipe cactus.$(br2)$(bold)Make:$() $(italic)Cactus$() + $(italic)Gravel$() → this seed. One-way; no sapling.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
